modules.module_title: Introduction to Driving Instruction & Road Safety Fundamentals
Traffic Laws, Rules & Regulations (Motor Vehicles Act)
Instructor Skills, Pedagogy & Practical Training Methods
Vehicle Maintenance, Emergency Procedures & First Aid Basics

questions.question: Ek driving instructor ka primary role kya hai?

options.A: Learners ko sirf car chalana sikhana
options.B: Safe aur responsible drivers banana, traffic rules ke sath

questions.explanation: Ek driving instructor ka main role learners ko sirf car chalana nahi, balki unhe safe aur responsible drivers banana hai jo traffic rules ka palan karein.

questions.question: Road safety kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf fine se bachne ke liye
options.B: Accidents aur injuries ko rokne ke liye
options.D: Gaadi ki speed badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Road safety accidents aur unse hone wali injuries aur deaths ko rokne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Yeh sign kya indicate karta hai: 'Yield' sign?

options.B: Give way to oncoming traffic

questions.explanation: Yield sign ka matlab hai ki aapko aane wale traffic ko rasta dena hai, agar zaroorat pade toh rukna bhi pad sakta hai.

questions.question: Pedestrians ki safety ensure karne ke liye driving instructor ko kya sikhana chahiye?

options.B: Pedestrians ko priority dena aur slow down karna

questions.explanation: Driving instructor ko sikhana chahiye ki pedestrians ko zebra crossing ya kahin bhi road cross karte waqt priority deni chahiye aur unki safety ke liye speed slow karni chahiye.

questions.question: Ek 'No Entry' sign ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Entry allowed for emergency vehicles only
options.B: Uss road par gaadi le jana mana hai

questions.explanation: No Entry sign ka matlab hai ki aapko uss road par entry nahi leni hai, yeh ek one-way road ka entrance ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Traffic lights mein 'Amber' (yellow) light ka kya function hai?

options.B: Stop
options.C: Next light change hone wala hai, ready ho jao ya ruk jao agar safe ho

questions.explanation: Amber light indicate karti hai ki light change hone wali hai. Agar aap intersection ke kareeb hain toh clear karein, nahi toh rukne ke liye ready ho jayein.

questions.question: Road par continuous white line ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Lane change allowed nahi hai

questions.explanation: Continuous white line ka matlab hai ki aapko lane change nahi karna chahiye aur apni lane mein hi rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Driving ke dauran mobile phone use karna kyun dangerous hai?

options.B: Distraction hota hai aur accident ka risk badhta hai

questions.explanation: Mobile phone use karne se driver ka attention road se hat jata hai, jisse distraction hota hai aur accident ka risk significantly badh jata hai.

questions.question: Driving instructor ko learners mein kaun si quality develop karni chahiye for road safety?

options.B: Patience aur tolerance

questions.explanation: Patience aur tolerance road par dusre drivers aur situations ke prati bahut zaroori hain, yeh road rage aur accidents ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Pedestrian crossing signs kis color ke hote hain?

options.B: Red

questions.explanation: Pedestrian crossing signs usually black symbols on a white or yellow background ke hote hain, often triangular for warning signs.

questions.question: Roundabout mein enter karte waqt kis traffic ko priority deni chahiye?

options.A: Jo roundabout mein enter kar raha ho
options.B: Jo roundabout ke andar already ghoom raha ho
options.C: Right se aane wale traffic ko
options.D: Left se aane wale traffic ko

questions.explanation: Roundabout mein enter karte waqt hamesha uss traffic ko priority deni chahiye jo already roundabout ke andar ghoom raha ho.

questions.question: Safety belt pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Accident ke dauran injuries ko kam karne ke liye
options.C: Gaadi ko fast chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety belt accident ke dauran driver aur passengers ko gaadi ke andar secure rakhta hai aur serious injuries ke risk ko significantly kam karta hai.

questions.question: Ek driving instructor ko kya avoid karna chahiye jab woh student ko instruct kar raha ho?

options.B: Patient rehna
options.C: Student par chillana ya gussa karna

questions.explanation: Student par chillana ya gussa karna unka confidence kam karta hai aur learning process ko negatively affect karta hai. Instructor ko hamesha calm aur supportive rehna chahiye.

questions.question: School zone mein driving karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Extra cautious rehna aur speed kam rakhna

questions.explanation: School zone mein bachche road par ho sakte hain, isliye extra cautious rehna aur prescribed speed limit ka palan karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Road par 'Zebra Crossing' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Pedestrians ke liye road cross karne ka safe area
options.C: Gaadiyon ke overtake karne ka point

questions.explanation: Zebra crossing pedestrians ke liye road cross karne ka designated aur safe area hota hai, jahan unhe priority milti hai.

questions.question: Foggy conditions mein driving karte waqt kaun si lights use karni chahiye?

options.B: Parking lights only
options.C: Low beam headlights aur fog lights (agar hain)

questions.explanation: Fog mein high beam se glare hota hai. Low beam aur fog lights use karni chahiye kyunki yeh road ko better illuminate karti hain aur visibility badhati hain.

questions.question: Ek driving instructor ko learners ko road par kya observe karne ki training deni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apni gaadi ke aage ka raasta
options.B: Har taraf ka traffic, signs, pedestrians, aur potential hazards

questions.explanation: Ek good driver ko hamesha 360-degree awareness rakhni chahiye, yani har taraf ka traffic, road signs, pedestrians, aur potential hazards ko continuously observe karna chahiye.

questions.question: Car start karne se pehle driver ko kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Music system on hai ya nahi
options.B: Tyre pressure, mirrors ki adjustment, aur seat belt
options.D: Fuel tank full hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Car start karne se pehle tyre pressure, mirrors ki adjustment aur seat belt check karna safe driving ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Steering wheel ko sahi tarike se kaise pakadna chahiye?

options.B: Dono haathon se 10 aur 2 ya 9 aur 3 o'clock position par

questions.explanation: Steering wheel ko dono haathon se 10 aur 2 ya 9 aur 3 o'clock position par pakadne se best control aur stability milti hai.

questions.question: Manual transmission car mein clutch pedal ka kya use hai?

options.B: Gears change karte waqt engine ko disconnect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clutch pedal gears change karte waqt engine ko transmission se temporarily disconnect karta hai, jisse smooth gear change hota hai.

questions.question: Jab gaadi parking mein ho, toh kaun sa gear engage karna chahiye?

options.B: Reverse
options.C: First gear (uphill) ya Reverse gear (downhill) aur handbrake

questions.explanation: Gaadi park karte waqt handbrake ke saath first gear (agar uphill hai) ya reverse gear (agar downhill hai) engage karna chahiye, extra security ke liye.

questions.question: Smooth braking ke liye driver ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Brake pedal ko ekdum se dabana
options.B: Brake pedal ko dheere se apply karna aur pressure adjust karna

questions.explanation: Smooth braking ke liye brake pedal ko dheere se apply karna aur pressure ko adjust karna chahiye, jisse jhatka na lage aur gaadi control mein rahe.

questions.question: Reverse parking karte waqt sabse important kya hai?

options.B: Rear-view aur side mirrors ka sahi use aur shoulder check

questions.explanation: Reverse parking mein mirrors aur shoulder check ka sahi use karna bahut zaroori hai taaki aap obstacles aur dusre vehicles ko dekh sakein.

questions.question: Uphill start karte waqt gaadi ko peeche jaane se rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Handbrake ka use karna aur fir dheere se clutch aur accelerator release karna
options.C: Brake pedal ko zor se dabaye rakhna

questions.explanation: Uphill start mein handbrake ka use karke gaadi ko peeche jaane se roka ja sakta hai, fir dheere se clutch release karte hue accelerator dena chahiye.

questions.question: Dashboard par fuel gauge ka kya function hai?

options.B: Gaadi ki speed batata hai
options.C: Fuel tank mein kitna petrol/diesel hai, yeh batata hai

questions.explanation: Fuel gauge driver ko batata hai ki gaadi ke fuel tank mein kitna fuel bacha hai.

questions.question: Indicators ka kya use hai?

options.A: Gaadi ko decorate karne ke liye
options.B: Dusre drivers ko turn ya lane change ka intention batane ke liye
options.C: Emergency mein horn bajane ke liye

questions.explanation: Indicators (turn signals) dusre road users ko aapke turn ya lane change ke intention ke baare mein inform karte hain, jo road safety ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Ek learner ko 'Blind Spot' ke baare mein kya sikhana chahiye?

options.B: Yeh area hai jo mirrors mein nahi dikhta, aur use check karne ke liye shoulder check zaroori hai
options.C: Yeh sirf trucks mein hota hai
options.D: Yeh area jahan headlights nahi pahunchti

questions.explanation: Blind spot woh area hota hai jo rear-view aur side mirrors mein nahi dikhta. Isse check karne ke liye driver ko apna sir ghuma kar shoulder check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Gear shifting mein 'double clutching' kab use hota hai?

options.B: Purani commercial vehicles mein smooth downshifting ke liye

questions.explanation: Double clutching purani commercial vehicles mein smooth downshifting ke liye use hota tha, jahan synchromesh gears nahi hote the. Modern cars mein iski zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: A-pillar blind spot ko kaise overcome kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Apne sir ko thoda aage-peeche ya side mein move karke

questions.explanation: A-pillar (windshield ke side wale pillar) se hone wale blind spot ko minimize karne ke liye driver ko thoda apne sir ko move karna chahiye, especially turns par.

questions.question: Gaadi chalate waqt accelerator pedal ka kya use hai?

options.B: Engine ki speed aur gaadi ki गति (speed) control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Accelerator pedal engine mein fuel supply ko control karta hai, jisse engine ki speed aur gaadi ki गति (speed) badhti ya kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Engine overheat hone par dashboard par kaun sa indicator light jalegi?

options.B: Oil pressure light

questions.explanation: Temperature warning light (usually red thermometer symbol) engine ke overheat hone par jalti hai, jo ek serious issue hai.

questions.question: Parallel parking sikhate waqt instructor ko kis cheez par emphasize karna chahiye?

options.B: Mirrors ka use, steering control aur surrounding awareness

questions.explanation: Parallel parking mein mirrors ka sahi use, steering par control aur surrounding ki awareness critical hai smooth aur safe parking ke liye.

questions.question: Jab gaadi neutral mein ho, toh kya hota hai?

options.B: Engine wheels se disconnected hota hai aur power transfer nahi hoti
options.D: Gaadi ki speed badh jaati hai

questions.explanation: Neutral gear mein engine wheels se disconnected hota hai, jisse engine power wheels tak nahi pahunchti aur gaadi free-roll kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Downhill driving mein speed control karne ka best tarika kya hai (manual car)?

options.B: Lower gear engage karke engine braking ka use karna

questions.explanation: Downhill driving mein lower gear engage karke engine braking ka use karna brakes ko overheat hone se bachata hai aur better control provide karta hai.

questions.question: India mein driving license ke liye minimum age kya hai (Light Motor Vehicle ke liye)?

options.B: 18 saal

questions.explanation: Light Motor Vehicle (non-transport) chalane ke liye India mein minimum age 18 saal hai.

questions.question: Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 ka kya main purpose hai?

options.A: Sirf gaadiyon ki manufacturing regulate karna
options.B: Road transport se related laws ko consolidate aur amend karna

questions.explanation: Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 India mein road transport se related laws ko regulate karta hai, jisme driving licenses, vehicle registration aur traffic rules shamil hain.

questions.question: Agar aapke paas valid driving license nahi hai aur aap gaadi chalate hue pakde jaate hain, toh kya penalty ho sakti hai?

options.B: Heavy fine aur imprisonment ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Bina valid driving license ke gaadi chalana ek serious offence hai, jisme heavy fine aur imprisonment ho sakti hai as per MV Act.

questions.question: Red traffic light ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ruk jao

questions.explanation: Red traffic light ka matlab hai ki aapko stop line se pehle apni gaadi rokni hai.

questions.question: Overtaking kis taraf se allowed hai (normal circumstances mein)?

options.B: Right side se

questions.explanation: Normal circumstances mein overtaking hamesha right side se karni chahiye. Left side se overtaking tabhi allowed hai jab aage wala driver right turn ka signal de raha ho.

questions.question: Gaadi ke registration certificate (RC) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Gaadi ki ownership aur details ka proof

questions.explanation: Registration Certificate gaadi ki legal ownership aur uski sari details ko prove karta hai.

questions.question: Driving karte samay kaun se documents gaadi mein hone chahiye?

options.B: Driving License, Registration Certificate, Pollution Under Control (PUC) Certificate, aur Insurance Certificate

questions.explanation: Motor Vehicles Act ke according, driving karte samay Driving License, RC, PUC aur Insurance Certificate gaadi mein hona mandatory hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko 'No Parking' sign dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Wahan gaadi park nahi karni chahiye
options.C: Sirf 5 minute ke liye park kar sakte hain
options.D: Emergency mein park kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: 'No Parking' sign ka matlab hai ki aapko uss area mein gaadi park nahi karni chahiye, chahe woh temporary hi kyun na ho.

questions.question: Horn ka use kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Dusre drivers ko pareshan karne ke liye
options.C: Hazard ya apni presence batane ke liye (judiciously)

questions.explanation: Horn ka use sirf tab karna chahiye jab aapko kisi hazard se bachna ho ya apni presence batani ho, aur woh bhi judiciously, unnecessary use avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Learner's License ki validity kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 1 saal

questions.explanation: Learner's License 6 mahine ke liye valid hota hai. Is dauran aapko driving practice karni hoti hai aur permanent license ke liye apply karna hota hai.

questions.question: Alcohol consume karke gaadi chalana kyun illegal aur dangerous hai?

options.B: Decision-making, reaction time aur judgment par asar padta hai, jisse accidents ka risk badhta hai

questions.explanation: Alcohol se driver ki decision-making ability, reaction time aur judgment kharab ho jaate hain, jisse accidents ka khatra bahut badh jata hai.

questions.question: Yellow continuous line road ke beech mein kya indicate karti hai?

options.B: Overtaking allowed nahi hai, aur lane change bhi nahi

questions.explanation: Continuous yellow line ka matlab hai ki aapko uss line ko cross nahi karna hai, yaani overtaking aur lane change prohibited hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ambulance ya fire engine ki siren sunai de, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Speed badha kar aage nikal jana
options.B: Apni gaadi ko road ke left side mein le jakar rasta dena

questions.explanation: Emergency vehicles ko hamesha rasta dena chahiye. Apni gaadi ko road ke left side mein le jakar unhe clear passage dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Pollution Under Control (PUC) certificate kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Gaadi ki speed badhane ke liye
options.B: Gaadi ke pollution emissions ko check aur control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: PUC certificate yeh ensure karta hai ki aapki gaadi prescribed emission norms ke andar pollution kar rahi hai, jo environment ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Traffic signal par right turn lete waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Indicator dena, oncoming traffic ko give way karna, aur pedestrians ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Right turn lete waqt indicator dena, oncoming traffic ko priority dena aur pedestrians ki safety ka dhyan rakhna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka driving license expire ho gaya hai, toh aap kitne samay tak renew kara sakte hain without re-test?

options.B: 6 mahine

questions.explanation: Driving license expire hone ke baad ek saal tak renew karaya ja sakta hai without re-appearing for the driving test. Uske baad test dena pad sakta hai.

questions.question: Hit and Run case mein victim ko government ki taraf se kya compensation milta hai (MV Act ke under)?

options.B: Sirf medical treatment
options.C: Fixed compensation for death or grievous hurt

questions.explanation: Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act, 2019 ke anusar, Hit and Run victims ko government ki taraf se death ke case mein ₹2 lakh aur grievous hurt ke case mein ₹50,000 ka fixed compensation milta hai.

questions.question: Defensive driving ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Dusre drivers ki galti ko anticipate karna aur accidents se bachne ke liye proactive steps lena
options.C: Sirf apni gaadi ki safety dekhna

questions.explanation: Defensive driving mein aap dusre drivers ki possible mistakes ko anticipate karte hain aur accidents se bachne ke liye pehle se hi precautions lete hain.

questions.question: Hazard perception mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Potential dangers ko jaldi identify karna aur un par react karna

questions.explanation: Hazard perception ka matlab hai road par hone wale potential dangers (jaise pedestrian, parked car, intersection) ko jaldi pehchanna aur un par sahi reaction dena.

questions.question: Safe following distance maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Aage wali gaadi ke sudden brake lagane par takkar se bachne ke liye
options.C: Gaadi ko fast chalane ke liye
options.D: Parking ke liye jagah banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Safe following distance aapko aage wali gaadi ke sudden brake lagane par react karne aur takkar se bachne ke liye sufficient time aur space deta hai.

questions.question: Wet roads par driving karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Speed kam karna, following distance badhana aur smooth braking karna

questions.explanation: Wet roads par grip kam hoti hai, isliye speed kam karni chahiye, following distance badhana chahiye aur smooth braking karni chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapki gaadi mein tyre burst ho jaye driving ke dauran, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Steering wheel ko firmly pakadna, accelerator se pair hatana aur dheere se brake apply karna
options.D: Gaadi ko neutral mein dal dena

questions.explanation: Tyre burst hone par steering ko firmly pakad kar control maintain karna aur dheere se speed kam karna chahiye, jisse gaadi control mein rahe.

questions.question: Night driving mein visibility improve karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Headlights ko clean rakhna aur low/high beam ka sahi use karna

questions.explanation: Night driving mein headlights ko clean rakhna aur oncoming traffic ke hisaab se low aur high beam ka sahi use karna visibility ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Aggressive drivers se kaise deal karein?

options.B: Unhe ignore karna aur unse dur rehna

questions.explanation: Aggressive drivers se confrontation avoid karna chahiye. Unhe ignore karein aur unse safe distance maintain karein.

questions.question: Distracted driving ke examples kya hain?

options.B: Mobile phone use karna, khana khana, ya passengers se excessive baat karna

questions.explanation: Distracted driving mein koi bhi activity shamil hai jo driver ka attention road se hatati hai, jaise mobile use, khana peena, ya passengers se baat karna.

questions.question: Aquaplaning kya hai aur isse kaise bach sakte hain?

options.A: Gaadi ka paani mein float karna
options.B: Tyres ka paani ki layer par grip kho dena; speed kam karke aur achhe tyres use karke bach sakte hain
options.D: Engine ka paani mein band ho jana

questions.explanation: Aquaplaning tab hota hai jab tyres paani ki ek layer par grip kho dete hain. Isse bachne ke liye wet conditions mein speed kam karni chahiye aur achhe tread wale tyres use karne chahiye.

questions.question: Intersection par enter karte waqt kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Slow down karna, dono taraf dekhna, aur ready rehna to stop

questions.explanation: Intersection par hamesha slow down karna chahiye, dono taraf traffic check karna chahiye aur stop karne ke liye ready rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Emergency stop kaise perform karna chahiye?

options.B: Clutch aur brake ko ek saath zor se dabana (ABS ke saath) aur steering ko straight rakhna

questions.explanation: Emergency stop mein, agar gaadi mein ABS hai, toh clutch aur brake ko ek saath zor se dabana chahiye, aur steering ko straight rakhna chahiye. Agar ABS nahi hai, toh pumping action use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Fatigue driving ke kya risks hain?

options.B: Reaction time kam hota hai, concentration kharab hoti hai aur microsleeps ho sakte hain, jisse accidents ka risk badhta hai
options.D: Music sunne mein problem hoti hai

questions.explanation: Fatigue driving alcohol driving jitna hi dangerous ho sakta hai. Isse reaction time kam hota hai, concentration kharab hoti hai aur microsleeps ho sakte hain, jisse accidents ka risk badhta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki gaadi ki headlights raat mein fail ho jayein, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Hazard lights on karna, dheere se gaadi side mein park karna aur help seekhna

questions.explanation: Headlight failure ek serious emergency hai. Hazard lights on karke, dheere se gaadi ko safe jagah par park karna chahiye aur help mangni chahiye.

questions.question: Motorcyclists ke liye kya extra precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Unke blind spots ka dhyan rakhna aur unhe sufficient space dena

questions.explanation: Motorcyclists chote hote hain aur aasani se blind spots mein chip sakte hain. Unke blind spots ka dhyan rakhna aur unhe sufficient space dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Driving instructor ko students ko 'scanning' ke baare mein kya sikhana chahiye?

options.B: Road par continuous aur systematic tarike se aage, side aur peeche dekhna

questions.explanation: Scanning ka matlab hai road par continuous aur systematic tarike se aage, side aur peeche dekhte rehna, jisse potential hazards ko time par identify kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Road rage se kaise bacha ja sakta hai?

options.B: Calm rehna, aggressive drivers ko avoid karna aur patience maintain karna

questions.explanation: Road rage se bachne ke liye calm rehna, aggressive drivers se dur rehna aur patience maintain karna sabse achha tarika hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki gaadi mein brake fail ho jaye, toh kya steps leni chahiye?

options.A: Panic karna aur steering chhod dena
options.B: Gear downshift karna (engine braking), handbrake dheere se apply karna, aur hazard lights on karna
options.D: Gaadi ko kisi cheez se takra dena

questions.explanation: Brake fail hone par, sabse pehle gear downshift karke engine braking use karna chahiye, fir dheere se handbrake apply karna chahiye aur hazard lights on karni chahiye taaki dusre drivers ko pata chale.

questions.question: Ek effective driving instructor mein kaun si quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Patience, clear communication aur positive attitude

questions.explanation: Patience, clear communication aur positive attitude ek effective driving instructor ke liye bahut zaroori hain, jo learner ko comfortable aur confident feel karaye.

questions.question: Driving lesson plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Learning objectives, teaching methods, aur assessment criteria

questions.explanation: Ek well-structured lesson plan mein learning objectives, teaching methods, aur assessment criteria shamil hone chahiye taaki learning effective ho.

questions.question: Learner ko feedback kaise dena chahiye?

options.B: Constructive, specific aur encouraging feedback dena, positive points highlight karte hue

questions.explanation: Feedback hamesha constructive, specific aur encouraging hona chahiye, jisse learner apni galtiyon se seekh sake aur improve kar sake.

questions.question: Dual control vehicle ka kya advantage hai?

options.A: Students ko fast drive karne ki permission milti hai
options.B: Instructor ko emergency mein control lene ki permission milti hai, jisse safety badhti hai
options.D: Sirf parking sikhane ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Dual control vehicle mein instructor ke paas bhi brakes aur clutch hote hain, jo emergency mein control lene aur safety ensure karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Nervous learner ko kaise handle karein?

options.B: Patient rehna, unka confidence build karna aur simple tasks se shuru karna

questions.explanation: Nervous learners ko patience aur encouragement ki zaroorat hoti hai. Simple tasks se shuru karke unka confidence build karna chahiye.

questions.question: Pre-trip checks mein kya shamil hai (instructor ke perspective se)?

options.B: Tyres, lights, mirrors, brakes, aur fluid levels check karna

questions.explanation: Har lesson se pehle instructor ko tyres, lights, mirrors, brakes, aur essential fluid levels check karne chahiye taaki gaadi safe ho.

questions.question: Instructor ko road par student ki galtiyon par kaise react karna chahiye?

options.B: Calmly correct karna aur explanation dena

questions.explanation: Student ki galtiyon par calmly react karna aur unhe sahi explanation dena zaroori hai, taaki woh apni mistake se seekh sakein.

questions.question: Learner ki progress ko kaise assess karna chahiye?

options.B: Continuous observation, regular feedback aur mock tests se

questions.explanation: Learner ki progress ko continuous observation, regular feedback aur periodic mock tests se assess karna chahiye, jisse unki strengths aur weaknesses ko identify kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Driving instructor ko kya ethics follow karne chahiye?

options.B: Professionalism, honesty, fairness aur confidentiality maintain karna

questions.explanation: Ek driving instructor ko hamesha professionalism, honesty, fairness aur confidentiality maintain karni chahiye, jo unke profession ki integrity ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Visual aids (jaise diagrams) ka use driving instruction mein kyun helpful hai?

options.B: Complex concepts ko simplify karne aur better understanding ke liye
options.D: Instructor ko rest dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Visual aids complex driving concepts ko simplify karte hain aur learners ko better understand karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Maneuvers (jaise 3-point turn) sikhate waqt instructor ko kya sequence follow karna chahiye?

options.B: Explain, Demonstrate, Practice, Correct (EDPC)

questions.explanation: EDPC (Explain, Demonstrate, Practice, Correct) ek effective teaching method hai maneuvers sikhane ke liye, jisse learner step-by-step seekhta hai.

questions.question: Ek driving instructor ko apne knowledge aur skills ko kaise up-to-date rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Regular training, workshops, aur traffic laws mein changes ko follow karke

questions.explanation: Driving instructor ko apne knowledge aur skills ko up-to-date rakhne ke liye regular training, workshops attend karne chahiye aur traffic laws mein changes ko follow karna chahiye.

questions.question: Learner ko self-correction kaise encourage karein?

options.B: Unhe apni galtiyan analyze karne aur solutions dhoondhne ke liye encourage karna
options.C: Sirf instructor ka bataya hua follow karna
options.D: Unhe khud hi sab karne dena

questions.explanation: Self-correction encourage karne se learner ki critical thinking aur independent decision-making skills develop hoti hain, jo long-term driving ke liye beneficial hai.

questions.question: Driving test se pehle instructor ko student ko kis cheez ke liye prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Test route yaad karne ke liye
options.C: Road rules, safe driving practices, aur test format ke liye
options.D: Inspector ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Driving test se pehle student ko road rules, safe driving practices, aur test ke format aur expectations ke liye thoroughly prepare karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek effective driving instructor ko different learning styles ko kaise accommodate karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek hi method use karna
options.B: Teaching methods ko adjust karna (visual, auditory, kinesthetic learners ke liye)
options.C: Sirf fast learners par focus karna
options.D: Student ko instructor ke method se adjust karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Different learners ki needs ko accommodate karne ke liye instructor ko apni teaching methods ko adjust karna chahiye, jaise visual aids, verbal instructions ya hands-on practice.

questions.question: Road safety campaigns mein driving instructor ka kya role ho sakta hai?

options.B: Public awareness programs mein participate karna aur safe driving messages promote karna

questions.explanation: Driving instructors road safety campaigns mein participate karke aur safe driving messages promote karke community mein road safety awareness badha sakte hain.

questions.question: Engine oil ka kya function hai?

options.B: Engine parts ko lubricate karna aur friction kam karna

questions.explanation: Engine oil engine ke moving parts ko lubricate karta hai, friction aur wear-and-tear ko kam karta hai, aur engine ko cool rakhta hai.

questions.question: Tyre pressure ko regularly check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Tyre ki shine maintain karne ke liye
options.B: Safe driving, better fuel efficiency aur tyre longevity ke liye
options.C: Gaadi ko fast chalane ke liye
options.D: Engine ko cool rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi tyre pressure safe driving, achhi fuel efficiency aur tyres ki lambi life ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar gaadi overheat ho jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Gaadi ko safe jagah par park karna, engine off karna aur cool hone dena
options.C: Coolant dal dena jab engine garam ho

questions.explanation: Gaadi overheat hone par, use safe jagah park karke engine off kar dena chahiye aur use cool hone dena chahiye. Garam engine mein bonnet ya radiator cap nahi kholna chahiye.

questions.question: Brake fluid level kam hone se kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Brakes ki performance kam ho sakti hai ya brakes fail ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Brake fluid level kam hone se brakes ki efficiency kam ho sakti hai, jisse braking distance badh sakta hai aur brakes fail bhi ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Flat tyre ko kaise replace karein?

options.B: Gaadi ko safe jagah park karna, handbrake lagana, jack aur spare tyre use karke replace karna

questions.explanation: Flat tyre replace karne ke liye gaadi ko safe jagah park karna, handbrake lagana aur jack, lug wrench aur spare tyre ka sahi use karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Accident site par sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Scene ko secure karna (hazard lights, warning triangle) aur emergency services ko call karna
options.C: Gaadi ko wahan se hata dena

questions.explanation: Accident site par sabse pehle scene ko secure karna chahiye taaki aur accidents na ho, aur fir emergency services (police, ambulance) ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Basic first aid mein 'DRSABC' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Drive, Rest, Stop, Avoid, Brake, Cool
options.B: Danger, Response, Send for help, Airway, Breathing, CPR
options.C: Don't Run, Sit, Ask, Be Calm, Call
options.D: Dust, Rashes, Scratches, Aches, Burns, Cuts

questions.explanation: DRSABC first aid ka ek acronym hai: Danger (check for safety), Response (check consciousness), Send for help (call emergency), Airway (clear airway), Breathing (check breathing), CPR (start CPR if needed).

questions.question: Agar kisi ko head injury hui hai accident mein, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe hila kar uthane ki koshish karna
options.B: Unhe stable rakhna, unka neck support karna aur emergency help ka wait karna

questions.explanation: Head injury ke case mein victim ko hilaana nahi chahiye. Unhe stable rakhna, neck support karna aur emergency help ka wait karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: First aid kit mein kaun si cheezein honi chahiye?

options.B: Bandages, antiseptic wipes, pain relievers, gloves

questions.explanation: Ek basic first aid kit mein bandages, antiseptic wipes, pain relievers, gloves, scissors aur adhesive tape jaise items hone chahiye.

questions.question: Battery jump start karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Dono gaadiyon ko touch karte rehne dena
options.B: Positive to positive, negative to negative connect karna aur goggles pehenna

questions.explanation: Jump start karte waqt cables ko sahi order mein connect karna (positive to positive, negative to negative) aur safety goggles pehenna zaroori hai spark aur acid se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Car ke coolant ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Engine ko overheat hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Coolant engine se heat absorb karke use radiator tak le jata hai, jahan woh cool hota hai, is tarah engine ko overheat hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Agar gaadi mein aag lag jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bonnet khol kar bujhane ki koshish karna
options.B: Gaadi ko rokna, sabko bahar nikalna, fire extinguisher use karna (agar safe ho) aur fire department ko call karna

questions.explanation: Gaadi mein aag lagne par sabse pehle gaadi rokni chahiye, sabko bahar nikalna chahiye. Agar safe ho toh fire extinguisher use karein, warna fire department ko call karein.

questions.question: Wiper blades ko kab replace karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab woh sahi se saaf na karein, streaks chhod dein ya noise karein
options.D: Jab gaadi ka colour change ho

questions.explanation: Wiper blades ko tab replace karna chahiye jab woh windshield ko sahi se saaf na karein, streaks chhod dein ya operation ke dauran noise karein, kyunki yeh visibility ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: CPR (Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation) ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Heart attack ya drowning jaise cases mein brain aur dusre vital organs mein blood flow aur oxygen supply maintain karna

questions.explanation: CPR ka main purpose heart attack ya drowning jaise cases mein jab breathing ya heart beat ruk jaye, toh brain aur dusre vital organs mein blood flow aur oxygen supply maintain karna hai.

questions.question: Brake pad wear hone ke kya signs hain?

options.B: Braking karte waqt screeching noise, pedal ka soft hona ya gaadi ka ek taraf pull karna

questions.explanation: Worn-out brake pads ke signs mein braking karte waqt screeching noise, brake pedal ka soft hona ya gaadi ka ek taraf pull karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko severe bleeding ho rahi ho, toh sabse pehla first aid step kya hai?

options.B: Direct pressure apply karna bleeding site par

questions.explanation: Severe bleeding ke case mein sabse pehla aur sabse effective step hai bleeding site par direct pressure apply karna, jisse blood flow ko control kiya ja sake.
